summary: Backend testing complete for VIP Table Booking, Bottle Service Pre-Orders, Admin Push Messages, and Geofence Location Check features. All 41 tests passed (100% success rate).

Geofence check-location uses async DB-backed message pickers which is good for admin customization

Test user luna@test.com has admin role so can access admin endpoints. Table deposit is in DEMO MODE (MOCKED). Geofence triggers are stored in geofence_triggers collection - may need cleanup between test runs if testing same user/cluster combination.
